channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Why's he a trillionaire when his companies barely make money? — 81 replies — 324.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why's he a trillionaire when his companies barely make money?

Open thread • Replies: 81 • Updated: 2026-06-14 04:50 UTC

OP

>Tesla makes $3.9B/year, and the amount goes down year after year, yet has a 1.5T market cap
>SpaceX literally loses money and its claim to future profit is Grok, a cash-burning AI model that is losing to GPT and Claude
>Twitter is breakeven at best
What's going on here? Are white boomers just throwing money at him because they don't like seeing Indians, Chinese and Jews running shit in tech? This is the only explanation for the Elon Musk phenomenon I can make any sense of.

Early replies (first 3)

62361459
>>62361452
People rightly see him as a visionary for the future of humanity with the ability to actually do the stuf he foresees.

on the negative side much of what he envisions is distopian

and the first person to pioneer a technology is often NOT the person who gets rich off it

but you have to start somewhere, and he certainly does stuff other companies can't.

62361461
companies do not have to be profitable for people to speculate on them performing well in the future, and it helps when everyone said every company would go to zero but instead became some of the most valuable assets by marketcap in the world because they provided goods and services people wanted

62361471
>>62361459
>rightly
He hasn't even done anything, period.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363313
>>62361452
People are so impressed by the self-landing rockets and the sci fi visions that they throw their money at him without any thought on whether the numbers are reasonable.

62363342
>>62362818
US government contracts are only 21% of SpaceX revenue ("Customer A" in the prospectus), and the growth potential is limited.

There is no strong vendor lock-in with SpaceX like there is with Microsoft. The US government absolutely wants to diversify its vendor base and will give contracts to other vendors at earliest opportunity

62363359
>>62361966
she also has an unlimited customer base

62363375
>>62361478
>EVs and robots
requires the us government to ban chinese evs and robots because they're raping him in price lmao, if elon is worth 1 trillion cuz muh robots then unitree is worth 100 trillion lmao

62363382
>>62361478
He's not ahead of the competition in anything except space.

For a time, he was ahead in EVs. This he achieved by leveraging advancements in battery technology by Japanese and Korean companies, while other car companies were hesitant because they did not want to cannibalize their existing ICE product lines.

62363405
>>62361452
everything is fake and gay in this economy and World retard
>SpaceX's valuation is expected to be nearly $1.8 trillion, revenue was 18 billion in 2025
>Toyota valuation is at 230 billion, revenue in 2025 was 320 billion

62363434
>>62363405
we don't need more cars
we need more spaceships
simple as

62363442
>>62361499
I'll believe sodium batteries when i see them. The voltage curve of the ones i've seen so far are horrible--a car at 100% charge might be fast but at 50% charge might be dog slow.

62363501
>>62363442
No no everything that comes out of China is bleeding edge and perfect on the first try.

62363544
>>62361452
because you keep giving him money

62363603
>>62363375
>Trusting chink shit
Not in my lifetime xiao

62363614
>>62361452
>all ''muh equity' meme, actually has nothing
Nearly all of the modern, popular billionaire class isn't even rich. Augustus or Mansa Musa mog.

62363633
>>62363442
They are a real thing. But they are not premium batteries for cars because of their rather low energy density. Much better suited for energy storage where you don't care about space or weigh that much if the specs are otherwise good.

62363679
>>62362689
>Like many of us, I don't like his liberalism or his transhumanism
...what? When people talk about musk being liberal or a transhumanist isn't the first thing that comes to mind

62363689
>>62363679
Maybe it should be

62364188
>>62362689
i wish neuralink were public id invest the shit out of that high key

62364215
>>62362689
After Elon replied "you have said the whole truth" to a post on twatter that was basically "jews are racist towards white people" it was like a switch was flipped. They drug him to israel to make him look at a babby crib from the mossad oct 7 false flag attack and see their gay wall. The US media jews went full Elon bad and the jews sent their deranged libtards golems after Teslas in the streets. It was a sight be behold. The Elon plate carrier is up there with the Jeb Bush hoodie moment.

62364243
>>62361452
Because him are genius businessman.

62364247
>>62361452
Idk but what he did with twitter is up there with the all time great American shit.

62364330
>>62361452
Hypeman incarnated.

62364434
>>62364215
Sometimes I forget how retarded people on this board can be. Thanks for the reminder

62364440
>>62364434
It's genuinely fucked how antisemitic this board can be. Why Mossad hasn't gotten it shut down and its posters dragged through legal coals is fucking mystifying to me.

62364443
>>62364188
Yeah people don't seem to get that the whole point of the company is to offer a form of immortality down the road, by creating neural-digital interfacing that can bridge consciousness between brain and computer. Neuralink can and will charge any amount they want for that kind of tech, once it matures. They could price it at ten billion 2026 dollars per person and they would have a years or even decades-long waitlist.

62364868
>>62364443
yeah anon when moon

62364886
>>62361471
keep seething commie

62364900
>>62363679
Most people talking about him are dogshit retarded

62364907
SpaceX is being destroyed because Elon has to pay off billions of debt for his AI shit and Twitter purchase. The easiest way to do this without destroying Tesla was to merge them all together and IPO them. They're going to sell their stock after Blackrock and Vanguard dump the boomer 401k money buying them

62364918
>>62361478
He threw a pretty good fastball that one time. It made more progress than the vehicle did thoughbeit.

62365050
>>62361452
because stocks don't behave rationally and memes move the market more strongly than financial schizobabble

62365078
>>62361452
you can become one too, just create a crypto coin, mint 1T tokens and sell 1 for $1 on the open markets

item.title: We need to talk about this — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
We need to talk about this

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-06-14 04:49 UTC

OP

I made a thread earlier today about MrBeast doing a livestream to rub everyone's face into his recently 500M subs. The livestream has a live chat enable where people spam their flags. To my surprise, only shitskin flags were spammed: India (by a lot), Bangladesh, Nepal, Nigeria, etc. No western flag. On that thread I made a comment about being it the reason for his sub room temperature IQ content being so popular. After all, shitskins outnumber Whites 10 to 1. In that thread, a anon made a comment that is a direct consequence of the browning of the Internet since the mid 2010s.

I've pondered on this fact, and in the light of the current ridiculous valuation of SpaceX, it all made sense to me. For those Millennial boomers like me and older, have you notice how since the mid 2010s, market valuation everywhere started NOT to make sense anymore? Bitcoin, prediction markets, overvalued hyped meme stocks, P/E over fucking 100 and the like. That's the fucking reason. Niggers, jeets, chinks and beaners using international aid money in order to play Gordon Gekko on the markets. Internet access practically turns your gooning room into a trading floor the like that would make a 1980s trader envious. With such low IQ brown goyim flooding the Internet, it wasn't long since everything went to shit online. That's also why any decent looking White girl with round firm knockers can make a killing on OF. She's pocketing millions of thirsty simping streetshitters. Bobs and vagene as we say.

When you think about it, the government uses taxes to collect your pay check, then gives that hard earned money to kikes in pissrael for "defence" and to caca-colored mongroids as international aid. Then the latter uses the money to enrich tech jews and terminally online sluts. There's literally a pipeline from the pockets of White men, to the pockets of the most wealthy jews out there, without you having any say on it.

Early replies (first 3)

62360091
>>62360063
They call him

MISTER BEAST

for a reason.

62360117
>>62360063
The Chinese firewall that we used to make fun of was actually high IQ.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62360142
so you're saying i shouldn't bet against indians and africans being retarded and should double down on whatever retard investments excite the browns? how will i know ahead of time what excites them so i can get in early?

62360147
>>62360117
the north korean internet is even higher IQ - you get access to administrative service portal, educational resources and something like curated wikipedia.. plus the propaganda stuff.. but there is no social media, so ITS GOLD

62360161
>>62360063

62360165
>>62360074
It's not schizo. I'm right about this 100%, and it is becoming a widespread socioeconomic problem

62361487
>>62360063
Ok so say theoretically we lose 20% of indians and indian like people due to starvation and an energy crisis, what happens to valuations and only fans whores then?

62361517
>>62360063
The US needs a firewall that blocks all foreign nations outside of the West and Japan. The problem is that so many of these shitskins have migrated to the West in the last 10-20 years. 80% of leaf posters are fucking jeets at this point

62361529
>>62360063
>For those Millennial boomers like me and older, have you notice how since the mid 2010s,
it's also extremely hard to find any project that actually goes up like bitcoin since 2021. Shit is fucked because of brown scams.

62361597
>>62360142
Buy a stock. Wait for the fish to bite. Look to see if institutional investors are there yet first. They bite then they make it a meme stock. I call it whaling. Also look for anything odd that will make it an organic meme stock.

62362453
>>62360063
based camp recently made a video on how the Access of third worlders affected the internet. Was interesting

62362458
>>62360063
You mentioning mr beast lets me know you're a retard and part of theproblem, but for others, it is a real issue.

I found almost all my show using IMDB, and now half of the top 250 are indian and kdrama slop that shouldn't be above a 4/10.

Like the most trite dating romcom sloppa imaginable from turkey or india will be sitting 0.5 points above HBOs rome.

62362578
>>62362458
>top 250 are indian and kdrama slop that shouldn't be above a 4/10.
Wow. Grim

62365058
Mr beast dubs his content into a bunch of languages so it's probably the only high quality stuff to watch out in those countries

62365069
>>62362453
Link?

62365075
Yes, international over-investment in America is a big problem. The American economy outperforms everyone else's so reliably that not just foreigh retail, but foreign retirement funds and institutional money prefer it over their own local investments.
The Warren Buffett indicator compares a nation's total market cap to their GDP. In a healthy economy, they're roughly 1:1. America's has been over 2:1 for a while now, meaning we're 100% overbought.

item.title: The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. — 54 replies — 42.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants.

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-06-14 03:46 UTC

OP

The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. He's upper class. And has 3 passports and owns properties and businesses (wealth) around the world. He isn't waiting on a paycheck to drive down to Costco.
Hint: it's a Rothschild property.
Making even a million bucks a year writing code for Elon or Bezos or Brin does NOT put you in the upper class. At all.
I am European and only we have class. We invented class.

Early replies (first 3)

62356062
>>62356048
Before AI, you could write code for ten years and then buy this.

62356086
Got so mad in the other thread you thought you would start a new thread about it LMAO

62356191
this is that same polish guy who was seething in the other thread about class or whatever

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62359275
>>62356048
yeah and he is never happy and is made of the same carbon we all are. class is fake. wealth is fake. you can be happy with nothing easier than being happy with everything.

62359283
>>62359212
the real god made himself known to man a lot longer than 2000 years ago. it was pre history, so of course we know nothing about it. abrahamic tradition is nonsense.

62359313
>>62356048
Damn I triggered this barely literate 2nd generation immigrant to America (note I never called him an American - he isn't) so bad. Damn, I am almost sorry since it's Friday but not sorry since you're brown.

62359371
>>62356048
I'm sure his life sucks everyone has a reason to cry about shit no amount of stucco will save your body from pain suffering and misery it is inescapable

62359452
>>62358695
God bless you please pray for me.

62359520
>class is following as many rules as possible while frowning and spending lots of money
Wow sounds like a good time sign me up

62359522
>>62358695
Oh please spare me the weak cope philosophy where Jesus christ literally gets abandoned by God when he needs him the most on the cross so there is no guarantee. God is a child's fantasy of cohesion that the world is simple and suffering has meaning, you think someone is watching you at all times and ur not smart enough to realize that emptiness is structural and is born out of language and it's a insurmountable gap that you can only move through and not ever reach. When u move towards it without expecting anything..that is when u can finally act finally be free from god at least,.to relate to the symbolic world of language differently in a way where u can actually do what you want.

62359740
>>62359522
You’re a fag or a drug or porn addict. Maybe all three. Fuck off retard.

62360058
>>62359212
>>62359283
"The fool says in his heart that there is no God"

Maybe try turning away your sinful ways, repenting and searching scripture instead of looking for handouts. Or you could just live out your days as a hard hearted rancid transgressor and go to the grave an unbelieving fool. Nothing anyone says can change your blackened heart. The Holy Spirit does that work.

62360102
>>62360058
why is a 24 year old mulatto born again christian zoomer trying to give me life advice?

62360116
>>62359522
you have free will to do what you want. But be warned that you lash out at the unblemished Lamb of God. The Alpha and the Omega who healed every infirmity and cast out demons from the land. The Good Shepherd who has defeated and and is Seated at the right hand of Power. The sad thing about people like you is that you are so fallen and your nature is so corrupt that you cannot even hear the Truth if it was read to you. Even the demons themselves that Jesus drove out of people KNEW that he was the Son of the Most High. Repent brother. The Kingdom of Heaven is at hand. We know not the day nor the hour of His return

62360814
>>62359005
>these death monuments will be renouned and respected and not some dinky little tourist hotsp-ACK

62361163
>>62357608
Why do people hate on these posts instead of try to figure out ways to improve their quality of life to have similar?

That's the whole point of this board. Instead of hating on people showing off their wealth figure out how to get it too.

I thought it was only like this on hip hop forums. Everyone hat s on each other and then refuse all ways of getting to it.

62361183
>>62359210
Or stop all or nothing thinking and find a way to live well so you can have wealth and not have to compromise yourself in any way?

62362527
>>62356048
Why would I want such a monstrosity.

62362541
>>62360116
>unfathomably based life speaking minister of /biz
I will miss you when the tranny kike mods ban you for speaking truth, but I know you will bear your cross with dignity.

62362654
>>62356048
why would you even want this? what are you going to use it for? throw parties 24/7 for people you fucking hate? If you live their 24/7 the nice view and garden just become mundane like everything else only now you have a lot less money

62362675
>>62362527
You’re not European, you would not get it.

62362885
>>62358695
>stay poor and let the Jews control wealth and power like a good goy

62363916
>>62356048
everyone there is a pedophile and you'd be asked to leave if you said nigger or faggot. pass.

62363922
>>62356062
Is becoming an expert in AI still a way to make money at all?

62364033
>>62362527
Nothing that a lick of paint, some landscaping and interior decorating couldn't fix. Location, location, location.

62364034
>>62356048
looks boring and not very comfy

62364139
>>62359212
Perhaps we are in hell.

62364148
>>62356048
>We invented class.
But you're not in it.

62364174
>>62356048
That’s nice buddy

62364781
>>62356048
Yeah and when the chips were on the ground and it came to violence the European elite were pretty much powerless to stop the germans twice.

Rich and WEAK.

meanwhile it was the poor, but self sustainable and smart North American freemen that had to save you TWICE.

Stop idolizing the rich and upper class. They are garbage retards, their only contribution is capital, but is capital really just ones and zeros on a hard drive, is that really what drives the will and spirit of a nation? The rich are retards.

62364790
Have you seen the movie with valkyrie niw thats a hot woman. Those other women no I have some morals im not fucking no one. Lol

62364797
>>62356048
I am the CEO of a very major circumcision equipment company and I endorse this message.

62364997
>>62357456
Bet he watches MTV's cribs all day. And thinks posh tacky is better than burger punk tacky. Lots of rich people do not live beyond their means to show off. It can even be hard to tell they are rich. It is the obscenely old money rich and new money niggers who have those villas. Or giant ye-haw ranch style estates you find distasteful.

item.title: WTF IS GOING ON HERE????? — 22 replies — 41.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF IS GOING ON HERE?????

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-06-14 04:32 UTC

OP

Tesla is losing profit every year

Spacex has never made a profit.

Musk is worth 1 trillion

What the fuck is going on here?

Early replies (first 3)

62360949
SpaceX has access to space. No other company does. Tesla will be bought by SpaceX. SpaceX will be bought by the United States if it's not profitable

62360950
>>62360939
Failing up

62360957
Investors are trend whores first and foremost and all the shit he does is trendy
>electric cars
>low latency satellite internet
>robots
>rockets
>data centers
>ai
Maybe step aside and realize your world take that creates a hostile view of these things is wrong? People want this stuff and Elon provides it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62360960
clown world

i bought because clown world

62360970
>>62360939
SPCX will be the most valuable company by marketcap by June 30th. Screencap this.

62360973
>>62360949
Correct.

Starlink is a global monopoly on worldwide internet access.

https://starlink.com/gb/map?srsltid=AfmBOoqlVTOgpN3ehfFOgyMLltD3ldYMI3VvILC7M6l5Cwbk1a3JiAlM

62361061
>>62360939
when did they replace the Elon android with a chink version?

62361070
I started praying to Elon in 2024 so he save my village and it work. All my village rich from AI now.

62361094
>>62360939
Stocks are more about feelings and vibes now a'days then they are about actual P&L. So it doesn't actually matter that both of Musk's companies are complete dog water as long as they seem "cool."

Kind of the same thing with cryptocurrencies. They have no actual intangible value, but people think they're part of the ingroup if they buy some.

62361118
>>62360939
>girls FTW!

62361128
>>62360939
Starlink is the answer.

62361157
>>62360973
>Starlink is a global monopoly on worldwide internet access.
>>62361128
we have satphones (+internet) for quite some time now (many decades) don't we.
are they all fumbling up the Laffer Curve and should lower price x100 but get x10,000 the customers, go to market area where spaceX is?

62361173
>>62360949
This

62361175
Starlink would be a great concept if it could operate autonomously. Imagine accepting crypto payments so that users anywhere could not only access the service but also browse the internet completely free from any local censorship or restrictions.
Unfortunately the whole thing relies on land infrastructure to connect the end user, so it still needs to comply with the laws of the location the user is at.

62361455
>>62360939
Pump and dump as one last big "fuck you" to brain dead investors that trusted large cap ETFs and tech-bro lemmings.

SpaceX by itself is a reasonably investable company, but the retarded structure and merges between xAI and X (formerly Twitter) are to let insiders rug pull on everyone that are either willing purchasers of the stocks or are forced to buy it with the blatantly jewish rule change to allow the company into the NASDAQ and S&P500.

Anyone sane should be selling their VOOs and Russell 1000. Literally anything else is a better investment right now: gold, crypto, mining, utilities, etc.

62361472
>>62360939
Why do you retards still think profit = share price?

62363450
>>62360973
>>62361128
Terrestrial mobile and fiber networks cover the vast bulk of the market by value

62363455
>>62361472
If the market is efficient, the share price should reflect the present value of expected future profits.

62364958
>>62361128
I don't need wireless Internet to be on parity with wired Internet, and I definitely don't need a globalized Internet that's infested with every scammer and black market opportunist on earth. The panopticonic surveillance isn't really my cup of tea either desu.

This "American" company is marketing a product that only appeals to foreign nationals and the feds are using that as an excuse to use it to spy on Americans. Who tf is proud to be investing in this?

62364972
>>62360939
Youre at jew daycare in the real world, elon is on maes

62365030
it all makes sense if you snort enough ketamine
life is a videogame
he just beat the Final Boss

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ag2Ycp4Stn0R1jt-fyTDR2SKoeiFvJqd/view?usp=sharing

62365061
>>62361157
The thing about Starlink is that Musk asked 'Why don't we throw like a million satellites into space? Lol.', which is what gave it the alleged worldwide coverage.

>>62360973
The latency isn't tolerable for any satellite internet service.

item.title: >me screaming at myself to not buy LINK in 2019 and just buy Bitcoin — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>me screaming at myself to not buy LINK in 2019 and just buy Bitcoin

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-14 05:00 UTC

OP

>me screaming at myself to not buy LINK in 2019 and just buy Bitcoin

Early replies (first 3)

62364690
>>62364657
I bought both and am still in profit on both.

62364700
Unless you bought the absolute peak of LINKBTC in 2019 you performed identically to BTC by holding LINK. Even if you did buy at the 2019 peak you only need the chart to 3x to breakeven which is not a lot all things considered

62364717
>>62364657
imagine if you had invested in yourself instead of a passive shitcoin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365040
>>62364657
>NOOOOO!!!!
>IT DOESN'T GO UP!!!
>THIS IS THE TOP!!!!
>NO DON'T POST "DIAMOND HANDS LINK MARINES"!
>NO NO NO NO!!!!

62365042
>>62365040
lmao

62365077
>>62364657
what possessed you to buy a bag of shit? did you actually think that the lightning will strike twice, some shitcoin will repeat the exact moon trajectory of early bitcoin?

62365079
>>62364690
>still in profit
that's not a good wording and a big sign to sell. cash in, let it go. you either sell at the bottom or hold long enough to see yourself become a baggie.

62365080
>>62364717
then he wouldn't even have any shitcoins. what the fuck are you gonna invest in yourself even, anon? tendies? you're the genetic refuse bottom feeder.

62365081
>>62364657
At $1000 it won't matter if you bought at $0.1 like the /biz/ OGs or at $50 like the fuddies. Just be patient.

62365086
>>62364657
i could've retired
instead im a jeetlinker

item.title: MARS MISSION IS A COMPLETE SCAM. IT IS PHYSICALLY IMPOSSIBLE TO SUSTAIN HUMAN LIFE ON MARS. IT WILL NEVER HAPPEN. IT'S A… — 27 replies — 33.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
MARS MISSION IS A COMPLETE SCAM. IT IS PHYSICALLY IMPOSSIBLE TO SUSTAIN HUMAN LIFE ON MARS. IT WILL NEVER HAPPEN. IT'S A…

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-06-14 04:15 UTC

OP

MARS MISSION IS A COMPLETE SCAM.

IT IS PHYSICALLY IMPOSSIBLE TO SUSTAIN HUMAN LIFE ON MARS.

IT WILL NEVER HAPPEN.

IT'S A CASH GRAB.

Early replies (first 3)

62358478
>>62358421
why does he need more cash if not to go to mars?

62358533
>>62358478
To be more rich

62358563
They have enough compute for really good deepfakes. There was never any intention to go. We learned from NASA that all you need is pretty pictures and th spacekeks will froth

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62358665
>>62358478
For jews its a dick measuring contest.

62359904
Impossible? No. Difficult? Yes. Very, very difficult.

62360411
>>62358421

62360427
>>62358421
It's not just that the Mast mision is unviable, it is that they are telling you that a company that can't manage to make money on Earth is somehow going to make money on Mars kek.

62360573
>>62358421
More importantly in the context of /biz/, it isn't profitable

62360832
>>62358563
why compute and not computation

62360954
>>62360573
Correct. Not profitable in the lifetime of any living person. But someday maybe.

62361241
It'll happen but not for another 100 years at least, most especially at the snails pace tech has "advanced" since the new millennium.

62361299
>>62361241
Tech has advanced extremely fast, but all that advancement has happened on the digital side since that's where the money is.
"Let the goyim deal in the real world" and all that.

62361307
>>62358478
Fund his many other failing businesses

Mars is red, dry, Antarctica but hey at least it has extremely high radiation levels too, enough to give you cancer in weeks. Oh and long term low gravity effects that would cause god knows what health issues. Oh and the soil is toxic as well.


Mars colonization is a scam

62363330
>>62358421
I read that the atmosphere is so thin that it feels like a warm summer's day at your feet at 20°C but your head would freeze instantly at -150°C

62363343
Mars is stupid, cold and empty.
Lets find a similar Earth in the Andromeda Galaxy.

62363397
>>62363343
what if they have niggers too

62363420
Do people realise Mars' gravity is like 1/3 of Earth? It's closer to the Moon's gravity than to the Earth, you'd have to smash like 2 Mercury's worth of material into Mars to get Earth-like gravity. Anybody on Mars will eventually get fucked up from their bodies being in such a low-g environment not to mention what would happen to soft-boned babies.

62363426
>>62363397
Imagine geniuses building a device to replace space metrics to "travel", find another Earth like planet, it's teeming with life, esrablish a colony, and the smartest animal there is roughly half as smart as the clever mathematicians and astronauts who travelled. So instead of providing cuteness and pats, they wreck the colony and ask for resources because it's our fault they ate everything.

62363459
whites just like to go venture out

62363771
>>62358421
>spend years training astronauts
>billions upon trillions spent
>first humans arrive on mars
>they are drooling retards with mush brains melted from space radiation
money well

62363802
>>62358421
>uhhhmm actually everything is a le scam and ai is just a hecking chatbot!
I see too many midwits parroting this

62364772
>>62363771
maybe black people would be relatively unaffected?

62364776
it's absolutely possible and should be done
you live underground to escape from the radiation. here, #1 problem is solved, bam!

62364786
>>62358478
If you listen to him which i know is near impossible, he wants to put solar panels in space, spcx is the space force of the US just like airforce or navy or military, they are doing satelight battles in space

62364789
lol, y’all are being hoodwinked
Elon isn’t doing rocket shit to go to mars
He is going to put the airlines out of business…imagine getting halfway around the world in an hour or so…
Nazi’s wanted to do the same thing, pretty cool

62364990
>>62361307
The actually profitable (if batshit) futurist take is the UK reasserting it's historic claim to the Antarctic peninsula, declaring the antarctic treaty null, colonizing it, and basically strip mining it for resources. The land and surrounding seas sit on massive oil and gas fields, and the geological surveys suggest that the antarctic crust is very rich in PGM and other critical minerals, much like southern Africa. The peninsula is also the only part of the continent that has rock exposed to the surface rather than buried in a mile of ice, too.

Honestly if you were going to mercilessly exploit any place on earth for resources, Antarctica is probably the most ethical place to do it. You aren't hurting any human habitat and there are virtually no animals or plants to harm on the surface. Bonus points for requiring the extracting parties to invest in self-contained housing/processing structures for staff and refining facilities, on site nuclear reactors, and a more automation heavy workforce.

It's like colonizing space but there is air and water, and there is shit worth getting there.

62365036
>>62358421
anon, you need to take a look at this board and its history and realize that no one actually cares about anything other than money. it's called speculation. no one cares about the feasibility of a business as long as other people are willing to buy their bags.

item.title: how the FUCK can I invest in semiconductors and spacex from Moscow? — 23 replies — 22.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
how the FUCK can I invest in semiconductors and spacex from Moscow?

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-06-14 04:02 UTC

OP

how the FUCK can I invest in semiconductors and spacex from Moscow? This pozzed country doesnt let me invest in anything not even the russian stock market

Early replies (first 3)

62361955
move to thailand

62361960
>>62361945
>expecting wholesome gif
>it's someone dying
This is why you subhuman faggot what is wrong with you people?? When will you become civilised? Then you can join the rest of humanity at the investment table.

62361965
>>62361960
he was fine though just a little disoriented dont be a tranny

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62361977
>>62361945
Invest in it by overthrowing Putin for being a race traitor. Russia is importing 800,000 jeets annually. That's worse than the UK.

62361990
>>62361945
Don't you have domestic scams?

62361996
>>62361945
You can buy exposure to most of the big semi stocks + spcx on hyperliquid. Non-KYC (for now) so just get a vpn and some usdc and go for it, if that's what you want to do. It's a perps exchange so you don't really own the stock, on the other hand it's a perps exchange so you can leverage your 50 rubles into 250 rubles of exposure if you want to.

62362003
>>62361996
thanks for the tip

62362010
>>62361945
In Soviet Russia, company owns you!

62362035
>>62361945
an hero and hope that you come back as an American in the next life

62362336
>>62361945
move to Zelenograd

62362422
Cock blocking nanny state

62362531
Can russians not even use ibkr?

62362698
>>62361960
Russians and Eastern Europeans are living the most depressed lives
Dying is considered a reprieve in those countries

62362738
>>62361945
Tell Putin he sucks ass, escape Puccia, do whatever you want with your life.

Or go die in a trench in Ukraine, your choice.

62362752
Its another indian meme thread, There is no reason why he wouldn't be able to invest in the Russian stock market, or in local gold and bond products (unless he is actually a muslim migrant with no citizenship). Moreover there are international stock brokers that do accept Russians. Finally for Russian it might be a better idea to invest in Cambricon and SMIC, than to put money in jewish stock markets.

62362754
>>62361945
I don't know maybe start caring and discussing about politics instead treating it as something you have absolutely no influence on like a fucking weather.

62362757
>>62362698
im bulgarian and i live better than you

62362976
>>62362757
>lel the table-let thinks he's living better than me
I have a full-sized table and one of those rugs too.

62363008
>>62361945
Wake up you moron.
All countries suck. Some suck a tad less. You're white. Why are you stuck in a shithole? Try to go somewhere else before slimes and poos ruin it. You may be able to invest too. But don't buy SpaceX until it dips well under 100, only dolts buy high.

62363714
>>62363008
Based

62363819
>>62362757
that seems like the average shit house in bulgaria. I don't know what you're bragging about. You larped being rich in another thread

62364082
>>62361945
get to the front lines you fucking faggot

62365019

item.title: No regrets selling BTC?? — 95 replies — 20.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
No regrets selling BTC??

Open thread • Replies: 95 • Updated: 2026-06-14 00:23 UTC

OP

Some talk about regretting it.

Anyone sold and still thinks it was the right move?

If you had the cash from that sale sitting in your account today, would you buy BTC again? Because I definitely would.

Early replies (first 3)

62339349
I sold my last bitcoin last year. Shitcoin is dead. AI is dead. Time to start acting like an african american.

62339372
>>62339349
Maybe regrets for buying? Should have bought chainlink

62339382
I rotated into XMR at like $105k, no regrets at all.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62354098
>>62351129
You have a point there

62354803
>>62350283
Maybe this is how people finally start exploring BTC in DeFi. Participation is still tiny. Imagine what happens if even 1% starts becoming 2%, then 5%.

62354820
>>62351106
I've actually earned more from memecoins than utility coins lately lol.

62354827
>>62339328
Anyone bullish on avalanche?

62355050
>>62339328
I sold when the Epstein files dropped. Feels good.

62355133
>>62354803
That’s the part a lot of people overlook. If TBVs actually work as intended, I think people are underestimating how much TVL native BTC use cases could pull in.

62355136
>>62355050
Time will tell whether it was the right call, but at least you acted according to your move.

62355617
>>62355133
It's crazy that DeFi security is still one of the biggest problems in the space.

62355631
>>62354827
Buy avax today and sell @ $100

62355632
>>62339417
Monero programmers, like the telegram founder, can be compromised
And monero is based on bitcoin. The entire crypto market exists because of all the money in bitcoin which is now backed by the US government.

62356269
>>62355617
At this point, thorough audits and multiple layers of review should be the standard, not a nice bonus anon.

62356538
>>62355631
What's your basis?

62357046
>>62345600
Probably the better route. We've seen too many centralized services blow up over the years, so you can't really blame people for preferring fully decentralized setups.

62357057
>>62355632
What about ZEC?

62357077
ICP

62357115
>>62339328
I sold at 116k I dont regret it at all and have about 2 mil waiting for sept-dec buy in.

62357126
>>62339328
I can never regret buying BTC desu, I bought back in around 70K and will DCA more if price goes below 60K. I'm also staking a little BTC on babylon for some extra yield

62357923
>>62355632
>Monero programmers, like the telegram founder, can be compromised
yeah just like the bitcoin developers right? they're the ones who control bitcoin?

it's a good question though, what if they were? miners would have to agree on consensus on which code to accept. if github ever refused to host monero's code then it would just move to .onion or .i2p

62359525
>>62357046
That's how it goes. They've already got GoMining, Ledger, and a16z involved, so let's see who they bring in next.

62359541
>>62357057
ZEC is interesting. If the privacy narrative picks up again, it's usually one of the first names people bring up.

62359557
>>62339328
I literally don't care about it. Mogged by virtually everything else over the last couple of years.

Also why is faggot shit like dogecoin still worth billions of dollars.

>in b4 bottom signal
Probably.

62359588
>>62357126
Sounds like you've got a plan and you're sticking to it. Hard to ask for much more than that. I wouldn't be surprised if more people follow suit over time. The $4B+ TVL shows there's already plenty of interest.

62359608
>>62359557
The market has a weird habit of rewarding the things nobody can rationally explain.

62359673
>>62357077
People still remember the launch, but the tech discussion around ICP is often more interesting than the price chart.

62360479
>>62359557
When bottom

62361782
>>62360479
Nobody knows

62362657
>>62359557
How do you mean?

62362661
>>62339328
While BTC is in deep bear stage, it's time to get in. I need to be greedy when others are fear.

62363445
>>62362657
It's his opinion

62364599
>>62339349
>Time to start acting like an african american.
finally someone said it

item.title: LTC to $60 — 8 replies — 18.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
LTC to $60

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-06-14 04:38 UTC

OP

According to tradingview, LTC is going to $60. It's currently at $44.44 which is the number of death in China.
Why are they telling us what the market will do now?

Early replies (first 3)

62364731
I'm just saying it's not a range unless it goes back up at least once. You can say it's trading in the $40-$135 range of you're just going from the high to the low.

62364745
Is it worth getting into low liquidity coins like LTC?

62364754
for what reason would the price of litecoin go up

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62364759
it's so dead that I searched for ltc rank and google results assumed I'm looking for this
>The abbreviation LTC stands for Lieutenant Colonel
translation: you will never get your money back out of this

62364761
>>62364754
Market makers punp everything across the board. It rarely matters which one you buy. But litecoin is usually among the first movers. They're telling us what they'll do in the OP.

62364770
>please help us pump to $60
Are we going to help the whales /biz/?

62364793
it's over

62365066
>>62364754
People buy dips.

Early replies (first 3)

62350030
>>62349989

62350349
>>62349989
by shaving you no longer have to worry about styling your hair and it's a repellent for nasty and bad women

62350516
>>62350349
>just bend over and let the norwood reaper fuck you in the ass

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350565
>>62350557
Almost everywhere in the world generic finasteride options cost like $20-30 for an entire years supply.

Are the pharma companies scamming burgers by overcharging finasteride like they do with most other meds?

62350592
Baldy, baldy over there...

62350594
>>62350565
Except fin is a tranny drug poison. Post finasteride syndrome reddit has 15k unique weekly visits.

62350624
>>62350594
About 20% of men between 18-35 (who arent on fin) develop ED.

When people who do take fin develop ED, of course the drug that nukes users dicks (temporarily) 1% of the time is what they'll blame it on, while in reality it's something else entirely. I'd bet the number of finasteride users who develop permanent ED is pretty close to 20%, the same percentage as men who don't use it.

62350707
>>62349989
Just make it socially acceptable to wear hats everywhere. I am balding and I just wear a hat all the time and I was still able to get laid. Basically by the time I make it to the point the hat comes off it is too late and the sex happens anyway. I'd imagine this is what it is like when trans women trick straight men into bed with them.

62350754
>>62350707

62350920
>>62349989
attractive men = baby boom

62351695
mandatory plastic surgery
everyone looks like kpop
big orgy ensues

62351707
>>62350594
Finasteride has a half life of 6 hours and PFS is a fake condition invented by American grifters and bald cucks.

62351757
>>62349989
good work mr president, that outta improve the birth rate

62352443
>>62350565
20 a year? I pay 9 a month
t. eufag

62352757
>>62352443
I’m eu too and I get a 98-pack of 5mg for about €35. Split the 5mg into 4 pieces and you have 392 doses.

Never heard of anyone actually being prescribed individual 1mg tablets here. Pretty much all doctors prescribe the 5mg option and tell them to split it in 4

62352787
>>62350565
no, it is also cheap in the US. it’s just annoying that you can’t buy it with an HSA. it’s also annoying that you need a prescription. should be OTC.

62355508
>>62350624
>>62351707
Literally everyone develops watery semen on it, have fun taking that poison that will fuck you up after some years, instead of just getting a toupe.

62355814
>>62355508
I've taken it for 4 years and never experienced that. Looked it up now and in clinical trials it was a side-effect that hit about 3% of users, and which went back to normal when they discontinued usage.

Tens of millions of men are on finasteride and like 95% of guys who go on the internet to talk about it are doing so because they had negative effects from it and need advice. It's like going to a subreddit about sexual assault and assuming that just because 90% of the people posting there got raped means that 90% of people in real life have been raped as well, when that is obviously far from true

62355979
>>62350349
*repellent for all women

62356219
The mistake most men make when jumping on finasteride is not getting their testosterone and DHT levels checked first. Since using a drug that nukes your DHT while having low T and by extension low DHT is a recipe for disaster.

Like 20% of men between 18-35 have clinically low T (under 300ng/dl) that warrants medical treatment. Up to 30% are in the danger zone (under 350ng/dl) with mild symptoms of low T. Any doctor who prescribes finasteride to these people and nuking their DHT levels even further deserve to lose their license for malpractice

62360477
>>62349989
>free hair transplants
>free lefort / bimax surgery
>free limb lengthening
>free boobjobs
>free rhinoplasty
>free miscellaneous cosmetic surgery
Honestly not a bad solution to a dying fertility rate

62360611
>>62350624
tranny well poisoner
no, dht is an important hormone and you cant just block it because your reddit sisters say the science is safe
>its not temporary
i have not taken it but i know dudes who have gotten permanently nooked form fin

62360635
>>62350754
I actually had this once, stopped me at the door and asked me to take my beanie off
I do so and he goes "DONT WORRY MATE!!! DONT WORRY, IM BALD TOO ITS OKAY"

62360696
>>62349989
shocked he's not focused on the teenie weenie epidemic.

62360743
>>62350707
Not watery semen at all. My shit works normal but I have zero opportunity to use it because fin isn't a miracle drug. I'm bald af. Still taking fin+min and using spray paint and hair fibers to fill gaps.

Maybe if I bust like 9 times in a short period of time might make it watery. My libido is crazy high. My favorite thing about fin is it prevents prostate issues. You might also find you are attracted to nearly every woman you encounter. So maybe expect heavier post nut clarity.

62360773
>>62350349
I don't have the right head shape to do that. I'd look fucked up even more than I already do.

62360967
>>62355814
did it make ur head smaller?

62362891
>>62355814
You will be on that crap for decades so enjoy the few good years left and you will see.

62362975
>>62360967
Clearly it shrunk his brain

62363126
>>62360967

>it made my dick stop working so it has to happen to everyone else too. it’s not fucking fair!!

lmao, cope limpdick baldies

62364757

62364760
>>62349989
Jesus fucking Christ is Korea fucked

62364771
>>62355508

item.title: I am SO fucking bored of my zero work WFH job. — 17 replies — 7.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
I am SO fucking bored of my zero work WFH job.

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-06-14 02:44 UTC

OP

I am SO fucking bored of my zero work WFH job. I still have to sit and do nothing in meetings.

I'm a natural autist so other people took my responsibilities and I have around 10% of the responsibility that the person who previously had my job had. I can't actually function in corporations. I can do the work and so on, I just can't dance the social dance that gets people to do things.

I work in a huge and slow corporation where everything takes many months longer to achieve than expected. My CV has gained close to nothing for over 2 years.

I literally daydream about being unemployed.

Around 5 years ago I'd feel smug at being in this position but now that I'm 30-something, I see my career and life as finite and I'm really gaining nothing here apart from savings to spend when I'm much older, uglier, and physically decrepit.

Early replies (first 3)

62363546
>>62363542
stfu faggot u could be jobless or even homeless u fucking nigger stop crying and just jerk off like everyone else at their wfh job and collect the money

god

62363548
I'm unemployed but also bored

62363552
You think you'd rather be in a stressful job you have to commute in for?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363560
>>62363542
maybe if you weren't fat you'd have more pep in your step

62363600
wow life is so hard for you

62363627
>>62363542
Kys

62363727
>>62363542
You need to be working on some projects and passions in your free time. Find something you enjoy or care about and get involved in it. If it’s something adjacent to what you currently do professionally that’s best but you also need a life outside work. Go volunteer at the animal shelter to walk pibbles or something.

62363741
You found a goldmine and youre complaining?

Cherish everyday that youre making easy money

62363783
must really suck getting paid for doing nothing

62363810
There is no such thing as wfh, its a psyop

62364014
>>62363542
You’re basically on corporate dole so just find some other hobby to monetize or play video games

62364028
>>62363542
What big corp? I wanna short it.

62364097
>>62363542
Dude just play video games off camera lol

62364107
>>62363783
this what the fuck is OP saying
>i want to WOOORK MOOAR give me THING TO DO I DON'T WANT FREE MONEY
fuckin just find other ways to entertain yourself goddamn, you're lucky as fuck you dont have to work much and collect a check

62364133
>>62363741
He has nothing going on, I had many jobs just like the one he has now. My whole life has been jobs where I do nothing. I know what it is like. Still better than working though.

62364788
>>62363542
Invest your time in building up your knowledge or skill on something. I was in your position and it got to the point where I was so fed up with my job that I left it even though I was constantly trying new things and learning on my own time. But I also left with the plan of breaking into the blockchain industry. I still don't have job now but I registered a company and am trying to find funding for it.

62364902
>>62363542
im in the literal and actual exact same position as you

item.title: New Pressure Cleaning Business — 3 replies — 6.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
New Pressure Cleaning Business

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-06-14 04:34 UTC

OP

Hi Fags,
I am currently on government benefits and receive about $600 AUD from the government each week.
This is fine but it is not enough to live.
I must make additional income UNDER THE TABLE so I can still retain my government benefits for being mentally retarded.
Hense, pressure washing people's driveways came to mind.
I charge $100 for 2 hours of work, undercutting my next closest rival by $50.
I'm making almost double the minimum wage, keeping my additional $600 per week and it's all cash in hand.
What do you think?

Early replies (first 3)

62364894
>>62364890
Reported

62365013
>>62364890
not sure about australia but in the US the tax forms have a specific line for reporting someone that didn't give you tax info. You're required by law to fill it out. Most people do.

your customers have nothing to gain by paying you under the table. And in the US at least you lose the tax write off if you don't report the guy.

62365063
>>62364890
You should fuck the gilfs and start your notary hustle. Every gilf you fuck, make sure she writes your name in her will.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: My diabolical plan to get rich: I invest money in the stock market. — 5 replies — 3.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
My diabolical plan to get rich: I invest money in the stock market.

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-06-14 03:28 UTC

OP

My diabolical plan to get rich:
I invest money in the stock market.
Every single day, I aim to make 1% profit on what I started with that day. Just one percent.
If I make 1% profit on the first day, my total is 101%. My new base is 101%, and the next day I make 1% profit on THAT. And I keep going.
Over time, this will make my wealth fucking EXPLODE.
ln(38)/ln(1.01) gives me 365.57
That's right, I'll 38x my money in a year. Sounds fucking crazy, but it sounds doable.

Early replies (first 3)

62362716
>>62362705
That doesn’t sound bad

62362733
>Just win everyday and never lose bro

62362734
That’s how I became a trillionaire, best of luck to you ol’ chap

>t. Elon Musk

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62364969
>trades 365/year
Nice...sounds like having 3 jobs

item.title: ETH ETH Txn cost on L1 is $0.004 . Txns at all time high — 11 replies — 3.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
ETH ETH Txn cost on L1 is $0.004 . Txns at all time high

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-06-14 01:20 UTC

OP

ETH L1 has already scaled drastically. People were complaining that ETH costs are way too high

Now that it's solved, why isn't it reflecting in price? Even after Tom Lee bought close to 5% of the supply, nothing happens to the price

Early replies (first 3)

62363245
Where else in the world can you transact peer to peer without middleman for $0.004 and the transactions are settled within seconds?

62363249
And why the f is BTC with zero use case at $1.2T market cap and ETH so low?
This doesn't make any sense

62363253
>>62363240
Twas never about high fees, it was almost this low for 2 years, even at 5k price. Twas about kinder maxikings and le ethkiller kumar shills fudding it, imagine posting here that vb and ef sold 100k eth in the orev year when lee boat it in the past week alone.... Basterd!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363262
>>62363245
L2s were a fail, i told it 5 years ago thats not the way, finally the nigger vitaleek admitted it a few months ago. Now we only need a mania and it ll pump another few dollars again, but yet i am buying under 1500 for now.

62363311
>>62363249
BTC is expensive because BTC is expensive. It gets all the attention of crypto because it's the biggest and oldest. Partly the same reason gold is much more valuable than other metals. ETH does the same SoV as BTC (and arguably does it better) but because it gets less attention, it gets less buys. Also Bitcoin doesn't have competing smart contract platforms launching constant smear campaigns against it. Maybe Bcash but that was almost a decade ago.

62364616
>>62363240
>Txns at all time high
Absolutely false lmao
No one is using that shitchain, which is why the fees are so low.
And to answer your question, the reason it's not helping the price of ETH (shitcoin) is because low fees are actually bearish to the price. If you need me to expand on why its bearish, let me know.

62364655
>>62364616
>Absolutely false lmao
Txns are in fact at all time high https://etherscan.io/chart/tx
Don't let me stop you from seething and denying reality though

62364681
>>62364655
>40% down from all time high
>Txns are in fact at all time high
Literally the chart you posted is showing this.
Also why would I be seething? I don't hold any ETH and the entire reason the OP made this thread was because he is the one (and most ETH bagholders) seething about ETH horrible price action. I am a BTC maxi, my investment is several times in the green from many years ago, while ETH bagholders can't say the same... and I'm the one "seething"? lol
I did use to hold some ETH until they changed it to PoS. If you believed the ETH "triple halving" or whatever the cope at the time was, and decided to baghold instead of doing simple research, put 2 and 2 together to realize how bearish the PoS switch was, and now you're married to the ETH bags, it's not my problem.
Don't worry though, literally any worthless shitcoin can pump, even absolute crap like ADA cardano, so maybe you can break even in your ETH investment in a few years if BTC carries the market hard enough lmao
Don't lose hope!

62364691
>>62364681

62364735
Ethereum is worthless. It has no value. It does nothing. What the fuck does a smart contract even mean? Nothing. Tom lee will be shoving a pineapple up his ass in hell

62364741
The best incentive is no incentive
